content.title: Simple Node.js API Server
content.short_description: Minimalist foundation for POST endpoint testing.
content.description: A lightweight Node.js Express API server designed for testing purposes. The project provides a basic RESTful endpoint that accepts POST requests and logs incoming data to the console. It serves as a minimal foundation for API development and testing workflows.
content.role: I created a minimal Express.js server with a single POST endpoint at `/post` that accepts JSON payloads and returns a success response. The implementation includes proper middleware for JSON parsing and runs on port 3030 with nodemon for development convenience.

achievements: Provides a simple, reliable testing endpoint for API development
Enables quick prototyping of client-server communication
Serves as a foundational template for more complex API projects
Demonstrates clean, minimal Node.js server architecture

screenshots: Server startup console output showing successful port binding
API endpoint testing with POST request/response example
